'''Lotide''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Mortex sector/Legends|Mortex sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==History==
Lotide was a [[Swamp/Legends|swampy]] world, and its main [[City/Legends|settlement]] and [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] was [[Market City]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the planet was home to an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Technical Branch Outpost]] used for weapons research and development. It was [[Mission to Lotide|infiltrated]] by a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] agents working out of [[Fangol]].

{{Planet-stub}}
